blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the availability of digital product download links.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for digital products.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for digital products.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Digital products (download links)', but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement. While the linked use case mentions a digital option ('Hair Care Guide' PDF download), there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the availability or functionality of the digital product download links. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary validation of the requirement is not supported by the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence confirming the availability or functionality of digital product download links.

deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the availability of digital product download links.
